Chen Ce йҷізӯ–
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Ce (йҷізӯ–)was born in Lujiang. Bandit defeated in 200 by Cao Cao, with the help of Liu YeвҖҷs advice.
